name: LAKELAND INDUSTRIES INC
business: Lakeland Industries, Inc. manufactures and sells fire services and industrial protective clothing and accessories for industrial and first responder markets. It sells globally through authorized distributors to end users in various industries including integrated oil, chemical/petrochemical, automotive, steel, construction, pharmaceutical, and utilities. It also supplies federal, state, and local government agencies such as the Department of Defense, Department of Homeland Security, and Centers for Disease Control.

exposures.sentence: We also supply federal, state and local governmental agencies and departments, including fire and law enforcement, airport crash rescue units, the Department of Defense, the Department of Homeland Security and the Centers for Disease Control.

Our authorized distributors supply end users across various industries, including integrated oil, chemical/petrochemical, automobile, transportation, steel, glass, construction, smelting, cleanroom, janitorial, pharmaceutical and high-tech electronics manufacturers, as well as scientific, medical laboratories and the utilities industry.

We recognize the importance of assessing, identifying, and managing material risks associated with cybersecurity threats, as such term is defined in Item 106(a) of Regulation S-K.
